flaccid male reproductive organ, fully visible and dropped softly against the body, natural skin tone, foreskin gathered loosely over the glans tip, anatomically grounded and unmistakable insertive flaccid visible dropped insertive flaccid visible.

small slightly erect male reproductive organ, approximately 3 cm length and 1 cm girth, sized forward, consistent realistic shaft body with wrinkled rough foreskin near the distal end clearly separating the shaft from a glossy distinct bulbous glans tip, very small visible urethral opening at the glans apex, firm and unmistakable insertive slightly erect visible forward insertive slightly erect small forward.

medium slightly erect male reproductive organ, approximately 8 cm length and 2 cm girth, sized forward and slightly elevated from the base, realistic shaft texture with foreskin gathered toward the distal end, glossy bulbous glans tip distinct from the shaft body, small visible urethral opening at the apex, firm and unmistakable insertive slightly erect visible forward insertive slightly erect medium forward.

fully erect medium-sized male reproductive organ, approximately 14 cm length and 3 cm girth, fully forward and elevated from the base, smooth taut shaft surface, foreskin retracted to expose a glossy bulbous glans, clearly visible urethral opening at the apex, firm and unmistakable insertive fully erect visible forward insertive fully erect medium forward.

male reproductive organ in sheathed presentation, retracted within an outer sheath of skin, only the tip emerging slightly, surrounding skin or fur smooth, anatomically grounded and unmistakable insertive neutral visible sheathed insertive sheathed.

female reproductive anatomy, fully visible, vertical slit-form vulvar opening centered between the thighs, clearly defined outer and inner labial folds, small visible clitoral hood at the upper junction, smooth flesh-toned external surface transitioning to soft inner mucosa, anatomically grounded and unmistakable receptive neutral visible exposed receptive neutral visible.

female reproductive anatomy in aroused receptive state, fully visible, slightly swollen vulvar opening with clearly defined outer and inner labial folds parted to reveal glossy inner mucosa, small visible clitoral hood at the upper junction, glistening surface slightly pinker than the surrounding skin, anatomically grounded and unmistakable receptive receptive visible exposed receptive aroused visible.

female reproductive anatomy implied through clothing, visible contour against the fabric without direct exposure, anatomically grounded position receptive neutral clothed concealed receptive clothed implied.
